metadata.notes: Visa summaries are structured from official immigration guidance for planning only. Users must verify requirements, documents, and processing with Hi Korea or the relevant Korean diplomatic mission before applying.

description: Student visa for degree programs at eligible Korean universities.
eligibility: Admission to an eligible Korean university
Proof of tuition and living funds
Valid passport and immigration application materials
processing_time: Varies by embassy, immigration office, and applicant circumstances; confirm officially.
renewal: Renew through immigration before expiry with enrollment and academic status proof.
notes: Common route for undergraduate, master's, doctoral, and exchange study. Conditions can vary by program and nationality.
